title: Woodsiopsis appalachiana
taxonomy: Woodsiopsis appalachiana is classified within the family Athyriaceae, a group of ferns. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. As a member of the Athyriaceae family, Woodsiopsis appalachiana is part of the Osmundopsida clade, a division of vascular plants. Its classification is further supported by molecular evidence, which confirms its placement within this family. Within the Athyriaceae family, Woodsiopsis appalachiana is considered a distinct species due to its unique combination of characteristics.
